knownGaps: macOS build uses dynamic Homebrew FFmpeg/Boost/OpenSSL dylibs instead of bundling runtime dylibs.
BCLAW_MACOS_ONLY stubs private FFmpeg CBS/NVENC paths; full live video frame validation remains a follow-up beyond RTSP SETUP.
Native /remote/input/ai/text returns 501 because paid/remote AI execution is intentionally not invoked in smoke.
